text: Hello everyone, welcome back to our
channel. In today's episode, we have
something very special for you. 10 real
English conversations about everyday
situations. Visiting a doctor, ordering
food at a restaurant, buying coffee at a
cafe, and taking a taxi. Job interview.
Buying flowers. Hotel check-in. hotel
checkout. These are real life moments
that many of us experience. Sometimes
they feel easy and sometimes they can
feel a little stressful. You will hear
Emma and Jason as they speak in these
common situations. They feel nervous,
polite, excited, and sometimes unsure.
These are real emotions that many
English learners experience. You will
learn useful English for asking
questions, giving information, solving
small problems, and speaking more
confidently in daily life. If you enjoy
learning English with us, don't forget
to like this video and subscribe to our
channel. And share this with someone who
is learning English with you. Practice
together and improve together. Now,
let's get started.
Hotel checkin.
Good afternoon. Welcome to our hotel.
Good afternoon. I'd like to check in,
please.
Of course. May I have your name?
Yes, it's Daniel Carter.
Thank you, Mr. Carter. Do you have a
reservation with us?
Yes, I booked online two days ago.
Perfect. May I see your ID, please?
Sure. Here you go.
Thank you. Let me check your
reservation. Yes, I see it here. You
booked a single room for two nights. Is
that correct?
Yes, that's right.
Great. Checkout time is 11 a.m.
Breakfast is included from 7 to 10 a.m.
That sounds good. Thank you.
May I have a credit card for the
security deposit?
Of course. Here it is.
Thank you. The deposit will be returned
after checkout.
Okay, no problem.
Here is your room key. You're in room
on the third floor.
Thank you. Is there Wi-Fi in the room?
Yes, free Wi-Fi is available. The
password is on the key card holder. The
elevator is on your left. If you need
anything, please call the front desk.
Thank you very much.
You're welcome. Enjoy your stay.
Thank you. Have a nice day.
Job interview.
Good morning. Please sit.
Thank you for the opportunity.
Can you introduce yourself?
My name is Alex. I recently graduated
and I'm excited about this role.
Why do you want this job?
I like your company and this position
matches my skills.
What are your strengths?
I'm responsible,
hardworking, and I learn quickly.
Any weakness?
I get nervous sometimes, but I'm
improving.
How do you handle stress?
I stay organized and manage my time
well.
Do you have questions?
Yes. Can you tell me about the team?
It's a small friendly team.
That sounds great.
Checking out of a hotel. Good morning.
How can I help you today?
Good morning. I'd like to check out,
please.
Of course. May I have your room number?
Yes, it's room 305.
Thank you. Just a moment while I check
your account. Did you enjoy your stay
with us?
Yes, I did. The room was very
comfortable and clean.
I'm glad to hear that. Let me review
your bill. You stayed for two nights,
correct?
Yes, that's right.
Okay. The total amount is $240
including taxes. You also ordered room
service once.
Yes, that's correct.
Would you like to pay by the same card
you used for the deposit?
Yes, please.
Great. I'll process the payment now. It
will only take a moment.
No problem.
Done. Here is your receipt. The deposit
has been returned to your card.
Thank you. I appreciate it.
Do you need a taxi to the airport?
Yes, that would be helpful.
I'll call one for you right away. It
should arrive in about 10 minutes.
Perfect. Thank you for your help.
You're very welcome. We hope to see you
again soon.
I hope so, too. Have a nice day.
Safe travels.
Taking a taxi.
Hello. Are you available?
Yes, I am. Please get in.
Thank you. Could you take me to the
airport, please?
Of course. Which airport terminal do you
need?
Terminal 4, the international terminal.
Got it. Are you flying internationally
today?
Yes, I have an international flight.
Okay. Do you have any luggage?
Yes, one big suitcase and a small
backpack.
No problem. I'll put the suitcase in the
trunk for you.
Thank you very much. I appreciate it.
You're welcome. All set. Let's go.
How long will it take to get there?
It should take about 40 minutes,
depending on traffic.
I see. My flight is in 3 hours, so I
think I have enough time.
Yes, that's plenty of time. Would you
like me to take the highway or local
roads?
Please take the fastest way. I don't
want to risk being late.
No problem. I'll take the highway.
Traffic looks light right now.
That's good to hear.
May I ask where you're traveling to?
I'm going to London for vacation.
That sounds exciting. How long will you
stay there?
About a week.
Nice. I hope you have a great trip.
Thank you. I'm really looking forward to
it.
By the way, the fair usually costs
between $50 and $70 depending on
traffic.
That's fine. Can I pay by card?
Yes, you can pay by card or cash.
Perfect.
Please make sure to fasten your seat
belt.
Oh, yes. Thank you for reminding me.
You're welcome. Safety first.
Absolutely.
We should arrive on time. I'll let you
know when we are close.
Thank you for your help.
My pleasure.
Buying flowers at the flower market.
Hello. Welcome to our flower market. How
can I help you today?
Hi, I'm looking for a bouquet for my
girlfriend.
That's lovely. Is it for a special
occasion?
Yes, it's her birthday tomorrow.
Oh, that's wonderful. Do you know what
kind of flowers she likes?
She really likes roses, especially red
ones.
Red roses are a beautiful choice. How
many would you like?
I'm not sure. What do you recommend? A
dozen roses is very popular. It looks
elegant and meaningful.
That sounds perfect. I'll take a dozen
red roses.
Great choice. Would you like to add some
baby's breath or greenery for
decoration?
Yes, that sounds nice. I want it to look
special.
Of course. I'll arrange it nicely for
you. Would you like to add a small card
with a message?
Yes, please.
What would you like to write?
Happy birthday. Thank you for making my
life brighter everyday.
That's very sweet. She'll love it.
I hope so.
Would you like the bouquet wrapped in
paper or placed in a gift box?
Paper is fine. Maybe something simple
but elegant.
No problem. I'll wrap it with soft pink
paper and a ribbon. Here you go. What do
you think?
Wow, it looks beautiful. Thank you so
much.
You're very welcome. That will be $40.
Can I pay by card?
Yes, of course. Please tap your card
here.
Done.
Thank you. Here is your receipt.
Thanks for your help. I really
appreciate it.
My pleasure. I hope she has a wonderful
birthday.
I'm sure she will. Have a great day.
You too. Goodbye. Buying coffee at a
cafe. Good morning. Welcome. What can I
get for you today?
Good morning. I'd like a coffee, please.
Of course. What kind of coffee would you
like?
H I'm not sure. What do you recommend?
Our latte is very popular. It's smooth,
creamy, and not too strong.
That sounds nice. I don't like coffee
that's too bitter.
Then the latte is a good choice. It has
espresso and steamed milk.
Perfect. I'll take one latte. Great.
What size would you like? Small, medium,
or large?
Medium, please.
Sure. Would you like it hot or iced?
Hot, please. It's a bit cold outside
today.
Yes, it is. A hot latte will be perfect.
Would you like regular milk or something
else? We also have almond and soy milk.
Regular milk is fine.
Okay. And would you like any sugar or
syrup?
Just a little sugar, please.
No problem. I'll add a small amount.
Would you like something to eat as well?
Maybe. What do you have today?
We have fresh croissants, blueberry
muffins, and chocolate cookies.
The croissant sounds good. Is it fresh?
Yes, it was baked this morning.
Great. I'll take one croissant.
Wonderful choice. That will be $550.
Can I pay by card?
Yes, of course. Please tap your card
here.
Okay, done.
Thank you. Your order will be ready in
just a few minutes.
Thanks. This cafe looks very nice.
Thank you. Is this your first time here?
Yes, I just moved to this neighborhood
last week.
Oh, welcome. A lot of people like this
place because it's quiet and cozy.
I can see that. It feels very relaxing.
I'm glad you think so. Here's your latte
and your croissant.
Wow, it looks great.
Be careful. The cup is very hot.
Thank you for telling me.
You're welcome. I hope you enjoy it. I'm
sure I will. It smells amazing.
Have a wonderful day.
Thank you. You too.
Visiting a doctor.
Good morning. How can I help you today?
Good morning, doctor. I haven't been
feeling well.
I'm sorry to hear that. What seems to be
the problem?
I've had a headache and a sore throat
for the past 2 days.
I see. Do you have a fever?
Yes, a slight fever since yesterday.
Have you taken any medicine?
Just some painkillers, but they didn't
help much.
Okay. Do you also have a cough or runny
nose?
Yes, I have a small cough.
Let me check your temperature and
throat. Please open your mouth and say
ah.
Ah. Your throat looks a little red. Your
temperature is slightly high.
Is it serious?
No, it looks like a common cold or mild
flu. You just need some rest and proper
medicine.
That's a relief.
I'll prescribe some tablets for your
fever and sore throat. Drink plenty of
water and avoid cold drinks.
How many times a day should I take the
medicine? twice a day after meals for 5
days.
Okay. Should I stay home from work?
Yes, I recommend resting for at least 2
days.
Thank you for your advice.
You're welcome. If you don't feel better
in 3 days, please come back.
I will. Thank you, doctor.
Take care and get well soon.
Ordering food at a restaurant. Good
afternoon. Is this seat free?
Yes, it is. Please sit. Welcome.
Thank you. This place feels very
comfortable.
I'm glad you like it. Here's the menu.
Take your time.
Thanks. There are many choices. What is
popular today?
Our grilled chicken sandwich is a
favorite. The pasta is also very tasty.
The sandwich sounds nice. Is the chicken
grilled? Yes, grilled. It's lighter and
healthier.
Perfect. I'll take the grilled chicken
sandwich.
Sure. Would you like fries or a salad?
Fries, please.
And something to drink?
A Coke, please.
Small, medium, or large?
Medium.
Any sauces?
Yes. Ketchup and mayonnaise.
Great. Anything else?
Do you have a light soup?
Yes. Tomato or chicken soup?
Tomato soup. Small
cup or bowl?
A cup is enough.
Perfect. Your food will be ready in
about 10 minutes.
Thank you.
Enjoy your meal.
